nasb.text: Put the trumpet to your lips! Like an eagle the enemy comes against the house of the Lord, Because they have transgressed My covenant And rebelled against My law.

esv.text: Set the trumpet to your lips! One like a vulture is over the house of the Lord, because they have transgressed my covenant and rebelled against my law.

cnv.text: “你要把號角放在你的嘴上， 敵人如鷹一般來攻擊耶和華的家； 因為他們違背了我的約， 干犯了我的律法。

ccb.text: “吹响号角警告众人吧！ 敌人要如鹰扑向耶和华的家， 因为百姓背弃我的约， 违背我的律法。
